pedal.label: SPACE — Pro-Filter Freq + Volume swell (CC11, continuous)

_layout_note: Hosted in Ableton (GR6 as plugin). Keys below are the BRIDGE's internal button index. The RK3's physical pods are rotated +4: physical pod 1 = bridge index 5, pod 2 = 6, pod 3 = 7, pod 4 = 8, pod 5 = 1, pod 6 = 2, pod 7 = 3, pod 8 = 4. Notes 60-67 (C3-G3) are assigned so physical pods 1-8 read as WOBBLE,RATE,SUB,SYNTH,SHIMMER,DELAY,GRIT,TAP. Buttons send NOTES (not CC) so Ableton toggles them natively.
